subcodes.first_line: O ye two wanderers in the wilderness of the love of God! Ever were ye remembered in His holy court and in the presence of the Ancient Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو سرگشته صحرای محبت الله همیشه در ساحت اقدس مذکور بودید و در حضور جمال قدم
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
